test-case.description: returns empty string when input is empty string
test-case.name: ConvertTo-HtmlEncodedString.Empty and null input.returns empty string when input is empty string

test-suite.name: ConvertTo-HtmlEncodedString.Plain text with no HTML characters
test-suite.description: ConvertTo-HtmlEncodedString.Plain text with no HTML characters

test-case.description: returns the original string when no HTML special characters are present
test-case.name: ConvertTo-HtmlEncodedString.Plain text with no HTML characters.returns the original string when no HTML special characters are present

test-case.description: encodes less-than sign
test-case.name: ConvertTo-HtmlEncodedString.HTML special character encoding.encodes less-than sign

test-case.description: encodes greater-than sign
test-case.name: ConvertTo-HtmlEncodedString.HTML special character encoding.encodes greater-than sign

test-case.description: encodes ampersand
test-case.name: ConvertTo-HtmlEncodedString.HTML special character encoding.encodes ampersand

test-case.description: encodes double quote
test-case.name: ConvertTo-HtmlEncodedString.HTML special character encoding.encodes double quote

test-case.description: encodes a string containing multiple HTML special characters
test-case.name: ConvertTo-HtmlEncodedString.HTML special character encoding.encodes a string containing multiple HTML special characters

test-case.description: returns a string type
test-case.name: ConvertTo-HtmlEncodedString.HTML special character encoding.returns a string type

test-case.description: returns a boolean value
test-case.name: Test-IsElevated.Return type contract.returns a boolean value

test-case.description: does not throw when called
test-case.name: Test-IsElevated.Return type contract.does not throw when called

test-case.description: returns true when WindowsPrincipal reports Administrator role
test-case.name: Test-IsElevated.Elevated session (mocked).returns true when WindowsPrincipal reports Administrator role

test-case.description: returns false when WindowsPrincipal reports non-Administrator role
test-case.name: Test-IsElevated.Non-elevated session (mocked).returns false when WindowsPrincipal reports non-Administrator role

test-case.description: returns true when InstallationType is Server
test-case.name: Test-IsWindowsServer.Server OS detection via InstallationType.returns true when InstallationType is Server

test-case.description: returns true when InstallationType is Server Core
test-case.name: Test-IsWindowsServer.Server OS detection via InstallationType.returns true when InstallationType is Server Core

test-case.description: returns false when InstallationType is Client
test-case.name: Test-IsWindowsServer.Server OS detection via InstallationType.returns false when InstallationType is Client

test-suite.name: Test-IsWindowsServer.Fallback to ProductName when InstallationType missing
test-suite.description: Test-IsWindowsServer.Fallback to ProductName when InstallationType missing

test-case.description: returns true when ProductName starts with Windows Server
test-case.name: Test-IsWindowsServer.Fallback to ProductName when InstallationType missing.returns true when ProductName starts with Windows Server

test-case.description: returns false when ProductName is a client OS
test-case.name: Test-IsWindowsServer.Fallback to ProductName when InstallationType missing.returns false when ProductName is a client OS

test-case.description: returns false when registry path does not exist
test-case.name: Test-IsWindowsServer.Error handling.returns false when registry path does not exist

test-case.description: returns false when Get-ItemProperty throws
test-case.name: Test-IsWindowsServer.Error handling.returns false when Get-ItemProperty throws

test-case.description: returns a boolean value
test-case.name: Test-IsWindowsServer.Error handling.returns a boolean value

test-case.description: returns a PSCustomObject
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Return type and shape.returns a PSCustomObject

test-case.description: result includes TestName property matching the provided value
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Return type and shape.result includes TestName property matching the provided value

test-case.description: result includes Status property matching the provided value
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Return type and shape.result includes Status property matching the provided value

test-case.description: result includes Message property
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Return type and shape.result includes Message property

test-case.description: result includes Recommendation property
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Return type and shape.result includes Recommendation property

test-case.description: result includes Timestamp property
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Return type and shape.result includes Timestamp property

test-case.description: accepts Pass status
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Status values.accepts Pass status

test-case.description: accepts Fail status
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Status values.accepts Fail status

test-case.description: accepts Warning status
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Status values.accepts Warning status

test-case.description: accepts Info status
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Status values.accepts Info status

test-case.description: accepts NotApplicable status
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Status values.accepts NotApplicable status

test-case.description: stores provided Message value
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Optional parameters.stores provided Message value

test-case.description: stores provided Recommendation value
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Optional parameters.stores provided Recommendation value

test-case.description: defaults Message to empty string when not provided
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Optional parameters.defaults Message to empty string when not provided

test-case.description: defaults Recommendation to empty string when not provided
test-case.name: Write-ValidationResult.Optional parameters.defaults Recommendation to empty string when not provided

test-case.description: returns Intune management type when ManagedDefenderProductType is 6
test-case.name: Get-MDEManagedDefenderProductType.Intune-only managed (value 6).returns Intune management type when ManagedDefenderProductType is 6

test-case.description: returns Unknown when no registry values are present
test-case.name: Get-MDEManagedDefenderProductType.No management registry key.returns Unknown when no registry values are present

test-case.description: returns co-managed type when ManagedDefenderProductType is 7 and EnrollmentStatus is 3
test-case.name: Get-MDEManagedDefenderProductType.Co-managed (value 7 with EnrollmentStatus 3).returns co-managed type when ManagedDefenderProductType is 7 and EnrollmentStatus is 3

test-case.description: returns Intune when ManagedDefenderProductType is 6
test-case.name: Get-MDEManagementType.Intune-only (ManagedDefenderProductType 6).returns Intune when ManagedDefenderProductType is 6

test-case.description: returns SecuritySettingsManagement when EnrollmentStatus is 1
test-case.name: Get-MDEManagementType.Security Settings Management via EnrollmentStatus.returns SecuritySettingsManagement when EnrollmentStatus is 1

test-case.description: returns GPO or None when registry keys are absent
test-case.name: Get-MDEManagementType.No management configured.returns GPO or None when registry keys are absent

test-suite.name: Get-MDEManagementTypeFallback.Intune detected via policy manager path entries
test-suite.description: Get-MDEManagementTypeFallback.Intune detected via policy manager path entries

test-case.description: returns Intune when Policy Manager registry path has entries
test-case.name: Get-MDEManagementTypeFallback.Intune detected via policy manager path entries.returns Intune when Policy Manager registry path has entries

test-suite.name: Get-MDEManagementTypeFallback.Security Settings Management detected via standard policy path
test-suite.description: Get-MDEManagementTypeFallback.Security Settings Management detected via standard policy path

test-case.description: returns SecuritySettingsManagement when standard policy path has entries but no Policy Manager path
test-case.name: Get-MDEManagementTypeFallback.Security Settings Management detected via standard policy path.returns SecuritySettingsManagement when standard policy path has entries but no Policy Manager path

test-case.description: returns Not Configured when neither policy path has entries
test-case.name: Get-MDEManagementTypeFallback.Not configured.returns Not Configured when neither policy path has entries

test-case.description: returns Onboarded when Sense is running and registry confirms state 1
test-case.name: Get-MDEOnboardingStatusString.Onboarded.returns Onboarded when Sense is running and registry confirms state 1

test-case.description: returns Not Onboarded when Sense service does not exist
test-case.name: Get-MDEOnboardingStatusString.Not Onboarded.returns Not Onboarded when Sense service does not exist

test-case.description: returns Not Onboarded when Sense service is stopped
test-case.name: Get-MDEOnboardingStatusString.Not Onboarded.returns Not Onboarded when Sense service is stopped

test-case.description: returns Partially Onboarded when registry key is not found
test-case.name: Get-MDEOnboardingStatusString.Partially Onboarded.returns Partially Onboarded when registry key is not found

test-case.description: returns full OS string with product name, version, and build
test-case.name: Get-MDEOperatingSystemInfo.Valid OS registry data.returns full OS string with product name, version, and build

test-case.description: returns string without version when DisplayVersion is absent
test-case.name: Get-MDEOperatingSystemInfo.Valid OS registry data.returns string without version when DisplayVersion is absent

test-case.description: returns Unknown OS when registry path does not exist
test-case.name: Get-MDEOperatingSystemInfo.Registry path not found.returns Unknown OS when registry path does not exist

test-case.description: returns Policy Manager path for Intune
test-case.name: Get-MDEPolicyRegistryPath.Intune management.returns Policy Manager path for Intune

test-case.description: returns standard Windows Defender path for SecuritySettingsManagement
test-case.name: Get-MDEPolicyRegistryPath.Non-Intune management types.returns standard Windows Defender path for SecuritySettingsManagement

test-case.description: returns standard Windows Defender path for SCCM
test-case.name: Get-MDEPolicyRegistryPath.Non-Intune management types.returns standard Windows Defender path for SCCM

test-case.description: returns standard Windows Defender path for GPO
test-case.name: Get-MDEPolicyRegistryPath.Non-Intune management types.returns standard Windows Defender path for GPO

test-case.description: returns standard Windows Defender path for None
test-case.name: Get-MDEPolicyRegistryPath.Non-Intune management types.returns standard Windows Defender path for None

test-case.description: returns Policy Manager path and AllowRealtimeMonitoring for RealTimeProtection
test-case.name: Get-MDEPolicySettingConfig.Intune management.returns Policy Manager path and AllowRealtimeMonitoring for RealTimeProtection

test-case.description: returns Policy Manager path and AllowCloudProtection for CloudProtection
test-case.name: Get-MDEPolicySettingConfig.Intune management.returns Policy Manager path and AllowCloudProtection for CloudProtection

test-case.description: returns standard path and DisableRealtimeMonitoring for RealTimeProtection
test-case.name: Get-MDEPolicySettingConfig.GPO management.returns standard path and DisableRealtimeMonitoring for RealTimeProtection

test-case.description: returns DisplayName for all settings
test-case.name: Get-MDEPolicySettingConfig.GPO management.returns DisplayName for all settings

test-case.description: returns config for BehaviorMonitoring
test-case.name: Get-MDEPolicySettingConfig.SecuritySettingsManagement.returns config for BehaviorMonitoring

test-case.description: returns Intune Only when ManagedDefenderProductType is 6
test-case.name: Get-MDESecuritySettingsManagementStatus.ManagedDefenderProductType present.returns Intune Only when ManagedDefenderProductType is 6

test-case.description: returns Security Settings Management when EnrollmentStatus is 1
test-case.name: Get-MDESecuritySettingsManagementStatus.Fallback to SenseCM EnrollmentStatus.returns Security Settings Management when EnrollmentStatus is 1

test-case.description: returns Intune when EnrollmentStatus is 3
test-case.name: Get-MDESecuritySettingsManagementStatus.Fallback to SenseCM EnrollmentStatus.returns Intune when EnrollmentStatus is 3

test-case.description: uses fallback detection when SenseCM key is absent
test-case.name: Get-MDESecuritySettingsManagementStatus.No management detected.uses fallback detection when SenseCM key is absent

test-case.description: returns array of validation result objects
test-case.name: Get-MDEValidationReport.Object output format.returns array of validation result objects

test-case.description: executes without error for Console format
test-case.name: Get-MDEValidationReport.Console output format.executes without error for Console format

test-case.description: returns Pass when ASR rules are configured with Block action
test-case.name: Test-MDEAttackSurfaceReduction.Pass path.returns Pass when ASR rules are configured with Block action

test-case.description: returns Fail when no ASR rules are configured
test-case.name: Test-MDEAttackSurfaceReduction.Fail path.returns Fail when no ASR rules are configured

test-case.description: returns NotApplicable when not running on Windows Server
test-case.name: Test-MDEAutoExclusionsWindowsServer.Pass path.returns NotApplicable when not running on Windows Server

test-case.description: returns Pass when on Windows Server and auto exclusions are disabled
test-case.name: Test-MDEAutoExclusionsWindowsServer.Pass path.returns Pass when on Windows Server and auto exclusions are disabled

test-case.description: returns Warning when on Windows Server and auto exclusions are enabled
test-case.name: Test-MDEAutoExclusionsWindowsServer.Fail path.returns Warning when on Windows Server and auto exclusions are enabled

test-case.description: returns Pass when behavior monitoring is enabled
test-case.name: Test-MDEBehaviorMonitoring.Pass path.returns Pass when behavior monitoring is enabled

test-case.description: returns Fail when behavior monitoring is disabled
test-case.name: Test-MDEBehaviorMonitoring.Fail path.returns Fail when behavior monitoring is disabled

test-case.description: returns Pass when cloud block level is High (2)
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudBlockLevel.Pass path.returns Pass when cloud block level is High (2)

test-case.description: returns Pass when cloud block level is High+ (4)
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudBlockLevel.Pass path.returns Pass when cloud block level is High+ (4)

test-case.description: returns Fail when cloud block level is Default (0)
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudBlockLevel.Fail path.returns Fail when cloud block level is Default (0)

test-case.description: returns Fail when cloud block level is Moderate (1)
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudBlockLevel.Fail path.returns Fail when cloud block level is Moderate (1)

test-case.description: returns Pass when cloud extended timeout is in optimal range (50)
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudExtendedTimeout.Pass path.returns Pass when cloud extended timeout is in optimal range (50)

test-case.description: returns Pass when cloud extended timeout is 41
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudExtendedTimeout.Pass path.returns Pass when cloud extended timeout is 41

test-case.description: returns Fail when cloud extended timeout is not configured (0)
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudExtendedTimeout.Fail path.returns Fail when cloud extended timeout is not configured (0)

test-case.description: returns Fail when cloud extended timeout is too low (10)
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudExtendedTimeout.Fail path.returns Fail when cloud extended timeout is too low (10)

test-case.description: returns Pass when cloud protection is enabled at Advanced level
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudProtection.Pass path.returns Pass when cloud protection is enabled at Advanced level

test-case.description: returns Pass when cloud protection is enabled at Basic level
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudProtection.Pass path.returns Pass when cloud protection is enabled at Basic level

test-case.description: returns Fail when cloud protection is disabled
test-case.name: Test-MDECloudProtection.Fail path.returns Fail when cloud protection is disabled

test-case.description: returns an array of validation result objects
test-case.name: Test-MDEConfiguration.Basic run (no flags).returns an array of validation result objects

test-case.description: returns NotApplicable when not running on Windows Server
test-case.name: Test-MDEDatagramProcessingWindowsServer.Pass path.returns NotApplicable when not running on Windows Server

test-case.description: returns Pass when on Windows Server and AllowDatagramProcessingOnWinServer is 1
test-case.name: Test-MDEDatagramProcessingWindowsServer.Pass path.returns Pass when on Windows Server and AllowDatagramProcessingOnWinServer is 1

test-case.description: returns Fail when on Windows Server and registry key is not configured
test-case.name: Test-MDEDatagramProcessingWindowsServer.Fail path.returns Fail when on Windows Server and registry key is not configured

test-case.description: returns Info status when device tag is set
test-case.name: Test-MDEDeviceTags.Tag configured.returns Info status when device tag is set

test-case.description: returns Info status when no tag is set (registry path absent)
test-case.name: Test-MDEDeviceTags.No tag configured.returns Info status when no tag is set (registry path absent)

test-case.description: returns Info status when tag registry value is empty
test-case.name: Test-MDEDeviceTags.No tag configured.returns Info status when tag registry value is empty

test-case.description: returns Pass when catchup quick scan is enabled (DisableCatchupQuickScan = false)
test-case.name: Test-MDEDisableCatchupQuickScan.Pass path.returns Pass when catchup quick scan is enabled (DisableCatchupQuickScan = false)

test-case.description: returns Fail when catchup quick scan is disabled (DisableCatchupQuickScan = true)
test-case.name: Test-MDEDisableCatchupQuickScan.Fail path.returns Fail when catchup quick scan is disabled (DisableCatchupQuickScan = true)

test-case.description: returns Pass when DisableLocalAdminMerge is 1 in registry
test-case.name: Test-MDEDisableLocalAdminMerge.Pass path.returns Pass when DisableLocalAdminMerge is 1 in registry

test-case.description: returns Warning when DisableLocalAdminMerge is 0
test-case.name: Test-MDEDisableLocalAdminMerge.Fail path.returns Warning when DisableLocalAdminMerge is 0

test-case.description: returns Warning when setting is not configured
test-case.name: Test-MDEDisableLocalAdminMerge.Fail path.returns Warning when setting is not configured

test-case.description: returns Pass when HideExclusionsFromLocalAdmins is 1 in policy registry
test-case.name: Test-MDEExclusionVisibilityLocalAdmins.Exclusions hidden (Pass).returns Pass when HideExclusionsFromLocalAdmins is 1 in policy registry

test-case.description: returns Warning when HideExclusionsFromLocalAdmins is not configured
test-case.name: Test-MDEExclusionVisibilityLocalAdmins.Exclusions visible (Fail/Warning).returns Warning when HideExclusionsFromLocalAdmins is not configured

test-case.description: returns Pass when HideExclusionsFromLocalUsers is 1 in policy registry
test-case.name: Test-MDEExclusionVisibilityLocalUsers.Exclusions hidden (Pass).returns Pass when HideExclusionsFromLocalUsers is 1 in policy registry

test-case.description: returns Warning when HideExclusionsFromLocalUsers is not set
test-case.name: Test-MDEExclusionVisibilityLocalUsers.Exclusions visible (Warning).returns Warning when HideExclusionsFromLocalUsers is not set

test-case.description: returns Warning when HideExclusionsFromLocalUsers is 0
test-case.name: Test-MDEExclusionVisibilityLocalUsers.Exclusions visible (Warning).returns Warning when HideExclusionsFromLocalUsers is 0

test-case.description: returns Pass when file hash computation is enabled
test-case.name: Test-MDEFileHashComputation.Pass path.returns Pass when file hash computation is enabled

test-case.description: returns Warning when file hash computation is disabled
test-case.name: Test-MDEFileHashComputation.Fail path.returns Warning when file hash computation is disabled

test-case.description: returns Pass when network protection is enabled in Block mode (1)
test-case.name: Test-MDENetworkProtection.Pass path.returns Pass when network protection is enabled in Block mode (1)

test-case.description: returns Fail when network protection is disabled (0)
test-case.name: Test-MDENetworkProtection.Fail path.returns Fail when network protection is disabled (0)

test-case.description: returns NotApplicable when not running on Windows Server
test-case.name: Test-MDENetworkProtectionWindowsServer.Pass path.returns NotApplicable when not running on Windows Server

test-case.name: Test-MDENetworkProtectionWindowsServer.Pass path.returns Pass when on Windows Server and both registry keys are set to 1

test-case.description: returns Fail when on Windows Server and registry keys are not configured
test-case.name: Test-MDENetworkProtectionWindowsServer.Fail path.returns Fail when on Windows Server and registry keys are not configured

test-case.description: returns Pass when Sense is running and OnboardingState is 1
test-case.name: Test-MDEOnboardingStatus.Pass path.returns Pass when Sense is running and OnboardingState is 1

test-case.name: Test-MDEOnboardingStatus.Fail path.returns Fail when Sense service is not installed

test-case.name: Test-MDEOnboardingStatus.Fail path.returns Fail when Sense service is not running

test-case.description: returns Pass when device is running in Active Mode
test-case.name: Test-MDEPassiveMode.Pass path.returns Pass when device is running in Active Mode

test-case.description: returns Warning when device is running in Passive Mode
test-case.name: Test-MDEPassiveMode.Fail path.returns Warning when device is running in Passive Mode

test-case.description: returns Found true when registry setting exists at correct path
test-case.name: Test-MDEPolicyRegistryValue.Registry value found.returns Found true when registry setting exists at correct path

test-case.description: returns Found false when registry path does not exist
test-case.name: Test-MDEPolicyRegistryValue.Registry value not found.returns Found false when registry path does not exist

test-case.description: returns Pass sub-test result when registry value is found
test-case.name: Test-MDEPolicyRegistryVerification.Pass path.returns Pass sub-test result when registry value is found

test-case.description: returns Warning or Fail when registry setting is not configured
test-case.name: Test-MDEPolicyRegistryVerification.Fail path.returns Warning or Fail when registry setting is not configured

test-case.description: returns Pass when real-time monitoring is enabled
test-case.name: Test-MDERealTimeProtection.Pass path.returns Pass when real-time monitoring is enabled

test-case.description: returns Fail when real-time monitoring is disabled
test-case.name: Test-MDERealTimeProtection.Fail path.returns Fail when real-time monitoring is disabled

test-case.description: returns Pass when real-time scan direction is bi-directional (0)
test-case.name: Test-MDERealTimeScanDirection.Pass path.returns Pass when real-time scan direction is bi-directional (0)

test-case.name: Test-MDERealTimeScanDirection.Fail path.returns Warning when real-time scan monitors incoming files only (1)

test-case.description: returns Warning when real-time scan monitors outgoing files only (2)
test-case.name: Test-MDERealTimeScanDirection.Fail path.returns Warning when real-time scan monitors outgoing files only (2)

test-case.description: returns Pass when sample submission is set to Send all samples (3)
test-case.name: Test-MDESampleSubmission.Pass path.returns Pass when sample submission is set to Send all samples (3)

test-case.description: returns Fail when sample submission is Never send (2)
test-case.name: Test-MDESampleSubmission.Fail path.returns Fail when sample submission is Never send (2)

test-case.name: Test-MDEServiceStatus.Pass path.returns Pass when WinDefend is Running and start type is Automatic

test-case.name: Test-MDEServiceStatus.Fail path.returns Fail when WinDefend service is not found

test-case.name: Test-MDESmartScreen.Pass path.returns Pass when SmartScreen is enabled via Group Policy

test-case.name: Test-MDESmartScreen.Fail path.returns Warning when SmartScreen registry key is not found

test-case.description: returns Pass when no AppRep exclusions registry keys exist
test-case.name: Test-MDESmartScreenAppRepExclusions.No exclusions configured (Pass).returns Pass when no AppRep exclusions registry keys exist

test-case.name: Test-MDESmartScreenAppRepExclusions.Exclusions configured (Warning).returns Warning when ExemptSmartScreenDownloadWarnings JSON value is set

test-case.description: returns Pass when registry key exists but ExemptSmartScreenDownloadWarnings is null
test-case.name: Test-MDESmartScreenAppRepExclusions.Registry path exists but no exclusion value.returns Pass when registry key exists but ExemptSmartScreenDownloadWarnings is null

test-case.name: Test-MDESmartScreenDomainExclusions.No exclusions configured (Pass).returns Pass when SmartScreenAllowListDomains registry key is absent

test-case.name: Test-MDESmartScreenDomainExclusions.Domain exclusions configured (Warning).returns Warning when allow-list domains are present

test-case.name: Test-MDESmartScreenDownloadOverride.Pass path.returns Pass when PreventSmartScreenPromptOverrideForFiles is 1

test-case.name: Test-MDESmartScreenDownloadOverride.Fail path.returns Fail when PreventSmartScreenPromptOverrideForFiles is 0

test-case.name: Test-MDETamperProtection.Pass path.returns Pass when Tamper Protection is enabled

test-case.name: Test-MDEThreatDefaultActions.Pass path.returns Pass when all threat default actions are set to Quarantine (2)
